useful_outputs: Reusable static source mapper tool for CSS/JS/HTML pressure heuristics.
Source map + details + decision reports with explicit uncertainty handling.
Roadmap next-step map prioritizing asset classification.
waste_points: Heuristic-only mapping cannot fully replace runtime profile slices, so some uncertainty remains by design.
missing_tools: Dedicated gated runtime profile summarizer that can safely produce frame-phase slices without raw trace pollution.

generated_tools_to_preserve.note: Useful and reusable candidate; should enter Scriptorium review for hardening and shared usage.

recommended_script_absorption: Promote source mapper into Scriptorium performance diagnostics family after review.
Add shared indicator schema for future performance mapping tools.
future_prompt_improvements: Require explicit likelihood and uncertainty tags for each suspected blocker category.
Require pre-commit scope checker output in every major report bundle.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add gate check that forbids optimization plan admission when asset uncertainty remains unresolved.
Add consistency check between source-map decision and roadmap next-step task ordering.
